title: Reflections on Lying and Politics: Excursus in Pseudology
further_info: Recommended Reading - Denery, D.G. (2016). The Devil Wins: A History of Lying from the Garden of Eden to the Enlightenment. Princeton, New Jersey: Princeton University Press. - Williams, C. (2017). “Has Trump Stolen Philosophy’s Critical Tools?” In: The New York Times, 17. April 2017. - Frankfurt, H. (2005). On bullshit. Princeton, NJ: Princeton University Press
